text:
どんなにいい食材も、味付けが悪ければ
とても食べられるものじゃなくなる。
調味料ってとっても重要なのよ。

同じ味だと飽きられちゃうし
常に新たなものを探していかないと！
そこで、今回の依頼内容というわけ。

あなたならきっとやってくれるって
信じてる、だからお願

We all know seasoning is vital to good cooking.
Even the finest ingredients aren't worth eating,
if the flavor just isn't right.

And plus, people get tired of the same tastes
over and over. Got to always be on the lookout
for something new!

Anyway, that's why I've asked you to go out
and scrounge up some ingredients again.
I know you won't let me down! Good luck!
